highlights.title: Pani Puri & Dahi Puri
highlights.description: Hollow crispy puris filled with spiced mashed potatoes, topped with your choice of tangy tamarind water or sweetened yogurt.

highlights.title: Signature Samosa Chaat
highlights.description: Crushed golden samosas smothered in fresh yogurt, tangy tamarind chutney, zesty mint sauce, and crunchy sev.

highlights.title: Chana Bhatura
highlights.description: A Punjabi classic. Spiced, slow-cooked chickpea curry served alongside golden, fluffy fried bread and fresh onions.

highlights.title: Authentic Chicken Biryani
highlights.description: Aromatic basmati rice cooked slowly with tender chicken, saffron, and traditional spices. Served with cooling raita.

highlights.title: Lamb Rogan Josh
highlights.description: Tender pieces of lamb slow-cooked in a rich, deeply spiced tomato and caramelized onion gravy.

highlights.title: Warm Gulab Jamun
highlights.description: Soft milk dumplings served warm in a fragrant cardamom and rose water syrup.
